Recommend
Recommend this post
Thanksgiving Turkeys: Delicious Centerpiece or Government Mind Control? - The Daily Show
Conspiracy-chaser Kevin Matthew Kelp (Michael Kosta) calls fowl play on Thanksgiving and pulls back the curtain on the government's grand plan to warp people's minds with compromised turkey. It's time to give thanks... for the truth.
